title: original lokicraft texture pack
description: Retro-style texture pack inspired by Lokicraft (a classic PE clone). Rebuilt from scratch, converted from .tga, and works on Minecraft Java 1.8.9. Blocks and items fully custom — mobs still vanilla.
body:
A nostalgic Minecraft Java texture pack rebuilt from the classic Lokicraft PE clone I played 4 years ago.

This pack captures the retro charm of early mobile Minecraft clones — blocky, bright, and full of low-res goodness.
I painstakingly extracted and converted every texture (originally .tga!), fixed transparency issues, and rebuilt the structure to work on Java 1.8.9 and up.

✅ Custom textures for most blocks and items
✅ Lokicraft/PE-inspired aesthetic
✅ Fully working grass, leaves, GUI, and more
❌ Vanilla mob/entity textures (for now)
🎮 Works best on Minecraft 1.8.9 (but compatible with newer versions if adapted)

Built for fun, nostalgia, and as a personal tribute to a simpler gaming time.
